_note: Overlay mappings for Mana Seed Farmer animations. Per-frame structure: {cell, mirror, ox, oy}. ox/oy are sprite-pixel offsets from the body cell's top-left corner. compatibleOverlays lists alternative sheet filenames the user can swap in for the same animation; default overlay is the first one listed.

bow_shot._explanation: Bow held throughout. Arrow flies during the last 3 frames after release.

down.name: bow
down._note: Short bow (default) or long bow (alt). 4 cells: neutral / drawing / drawn / released.

down.name: arrow
down._note: Bottom row (cells 0-4) = vertical-flying arrows for up/down. Top row (cells 5-9) = horizontal for side. Arrow advances away from player on frames 3-5.

up.name: bow
up._note: Short bow (default) or long bow (alt). 4 cells: neutral / drawing / drawn / released.

up.name: arrow
up._note: Bottom row (cells 0-4) = vertical-flying arrows for up/down. Top row (cells 5-9) = horizontal for side. Arrow advances away from player on frames 3-5.

side.name: bow
side._note: Short bow (default) or long bow (alt). 4 cells: neutral / drawing / drawn / released.

side.name: arrow
side._note: Bottom row (cells 0-4) = vertical-flying arrows for up/down. Top row (cells 5-9) = horizontal for side. Arrow advances away from player on frames 3-5.

overhand_strike._explanation: Overhead swing — used for striking down with weapons, mining with pickaxe, hoeing soil. Body holds a 4-frame strike: wind-up, mid-swing, impact, hold-impact.

down.name: weapon_or_tool
down._note: Default = pickaxe. Compatible with any 1hwpn weapon or farming tool. 7-cell tool layout assumption: 3 cells down, 1 cell up, 3 cells side (verify in editor — wrong = re-map).

up.name: weapon_or_tool
up._note: Default = pickaxe. Compatible with any 1hwpn weapon or farming tool. 7-cell tool layout assumption: 3 cells down, 1 cell up, 3 cells side (verify in editor — wrong = re-map).

side.name: weapon_or_tool
side._note: Default = pickaxe. Compatible with any 1hwpn weapon or farming tool. 7-cell tool layout assumption: 3 cells down, 1 cell up, 3 cells side (verify in editor — wrong = re-map).

forehand_strike._explanation: Horizontal forward swing — chopping wood, slashing with sword. Same 4-frame body structure as overhand.

down.name: weapon_or_tool
down._note: Default = wood axe. Compatible with any 1hwpn weapon or farming tool. Forehand layout may differ from overhand for tool sheets — verify per-frame in editor.

down.name: slash
down._note: Slash arc on impact. Different arc style from overhand — pick a horizontal-arc cell.

up.name: weapon_or_tool
up._note: Default = wood axe. Compatible with any 1hwpn weapon or farming tool. Forehand layout may differ from overhand for tool sheets — verify per-frame in editor.

up.name: slash
up._note: Slash arc on impact. Different arc style from overhand — pick a horizontal-arc cell.

side.name: weapon_or_tool
side._note: Default = wood axe. Compatible with any 1hwpn weapon or farming tool. Forehand layout may differ from overhand for tool sheets — verify per-frame in editor.

side.name: slash
side._note: Slash arc on impact. Different arc style from overhand — pick a horizontal-arc cell.

backhand_strike._explanation: Reverse swing — restricted to scythe (harvesting wheat) and bug net (catching bugs). NOT for combat weapons. Same 4-frame body structure.

down.name: scythe_or_bugnet
down._note: Default = farmer_tool_001 (likely hoe — VERIFY: which sheet is scythe? which is bug net? May need to be different sheets than the listed tools. Check the prop sheet farmer_props_32x32_v00.png for scythe/bugnet props.).

down.name: slash
down._note: Backhand-direction slash arc. Probably reversed from forehand.

up.name: scythe_or_bugnet
up._note: Default = farmer_tool_001 (likely hoe — VERIFY: which sheet is scythe? which is bug net? May need to be different sheets than the listed tools. Check the prop sheet farmer_props_32x32_v00.png for scythe/bugnet props.).

up.name: slash
up._note: Backhand-direction slash arc. Probably reversed from forehand.

side.name: scythe_or_bugnet
side._note: Default = farmer_tool_001 (likely hoe — VERIFY: which sheet is scythe? which is bug net? May need to be different sheets than the listed tools. Check the prop sheet farmer_props_32x32_v00.png for scythe/bugnet props.).

side.name: slash
side._note: Backhand-direction slash arc. Probably reversed from forehand.

default.name: track_1
default._note: this uses frame 4. works also with frame 5 or 6 or 7. different guitars

default.name: track_1
default._note: this uses frame 0. works also with frame 1 or 2 or 3. different flutes

default.name: track_1
default._note: this uses frame 8. works also with frame 9 or 10 or 11. different drums.

plant_seeds._explanation: Tossing seeds. 4-col logical grid drawn from the leftmost portion of the 6-col sheet — the actual file is 192px wide (6×32) but the seed sprites occupy cols 1-3 of rows 0-2, which is the same pixel range under either gridCols interpretation.

water._explanation: Watering with a can. Down direction shows the can pouring; up/side cells aren't authored yet (frames are null).

cast_fishing_line._explanation: Casting a fishing line. up/down use the (up, down) sheet (8×4 grid of 64×96 cells); side uses the (right, left) sheet (2×8 grid of 112×64 cells). Per-direction overrides route the sheet + cell dims at draw time.

got_a_bite._explanation: Fish tugs the line. up/down use the (up, down) sheet; side uses the (right, left) sheet. Per-direction overrides route at draw time.

got_it._explanation: Reels in the catch. up/down use the (up, down) sheet; side uses the (right, left) sheet. Per-direction overrides route at draw time.
